items.name: Eliksni Captain - Helmet And Head
items.description:
"Fallen run in packs, led by an individual Captain. There is no denying a Captain's might; they are the fiercest of the Fallen. There is this sense of tattered nobility to them. You can see it in the way they carry themselves. They think they're better than us. They believe that Earth belongs to them."

Armor: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/74218241518435/Eliksni-Captain-Armor
Cape: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/103299472103180/Eliksni-Captain-Cape
Scarf: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/93951086037738/Eliksni-Captain-Scarf
Left Pauldron: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/94299728260720/Eliksni-Captain-Left-Pauldron
Right Pauldron: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/135369839483375/Eliksni-Captain-Right-Pauldron

Inspired by Destiny
items.searchText:
eliksni captain - helmet and head "fallen run in packs, led by an individual captain. there is no denying a captain's might; they are the fiercest of the fallen. there is this sense of tattered nobility to them. you can see it in the way they carry themselves. they think they're better than us. they believe that earth belongs to them."
